Usage:
  grabbit config edit [flags]

Edit the config. A default config will be created if it doesn't exist

Flags:
      --editor string   path to editor [default: "vi"] [required] [env: EDITOR] [config: editor] [setby: envvar] [current: "emacs"]

Global Flags:
      --color string        Use ANSI colors [default: "auto"] [env: WARG_COLOR] [setby: appdefault] [current: "auto"]
  -h, --help string         Print help [default: "default"] [setby: appdefault] [current: "default"]
      --term-width string   Terminal width. Should be a positive integer, "auto", or "infinite". If "auto" the app will attempt to detect terminal width and fall back to 120 if detection fails [default: "auto"] [env: WARG_TERM_WIDTH] [setby: appdefault] [current: "auto"]

Footer:
Examples:

	# Use defaults
	grabbit config edit

	# Override defaults
	grabbit config edit --config-path /path/to/config --editor code
